name: Do I have to give 10 years medical history for comp in West Valley?
description: Yes, 10 years pre-litigation; refusal = denial risk.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I have to give 10 years medical history for comp in West Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, 10 years pre-litigation; refusal = denial risk.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, sign releases for 10-year history pre-litigation (15 post); refusal risks denial.[1] Includes priors, family docs.[1] Key factors: (1) List all providers; (2) Honesty prevents credibility loss; (3) Insurer uses for pre-existing defense; (4) Limit scope if advised.[1] Review before signing, disclose accurately. Cooperation essential early.
